creator: ler@FreeBSD.org
text:
the CPPFLAGS line I suspect is just a whitespace change (I only changed PORTREVISION in
the Makefile).

The decode2text.sh patch was re-genned when I did a make makepatch
after make patch, patch -p1 < commit.patch.

up 2 you if you want to just drop that part of my patch....
